definition: Nine-digit TEA campus ID (zero-padded). Primary join key across all TEA sources.
caveat: Leading apostrophe stripped from AskTED source value.

definition: 12-digit NCES school ID. Used to join CRDC data (equals COMBOKEY in CRDC files).
caveat: 2 of 60 cohort schools had no CRDC match on this key.

definition: Campus name as listed in AskTED.
Instruction type: REGULAR INSTRUCTIONAL or ALTERNATIVE INSTRUCTIONAL.
caveat: DAEP and JJAEP campuses excluded from cohort.

definition: Charter classification (OPEN ENROLLMENT CHARTER for charter campuses; null for ISDs).
Derived school level: elementary, middle, high, or mixed.
caveat: Derived from grade_range using TEA grade spans.

definition: Student enrollment count as of October 2025.
null_suppression_notes: AskTED sentinel -1 converted to null.

definition: School operational status (Active for all rows in cohort).
caveat: All rows Active; inactive and under-construction schools excluded from cohort.

definition: Physical site city (DALLAS for all rows; cohort filtered on this field).
Magnet school flag from AskTED (Y or N).
Collection year of the enrollment field (2025 = October 2025 snapshot).

caveat: Values: A, B, C, D, F, 'Not Rated'. Null if campus not in file. 'Not Rated' is a real TEA designation (new schools, DAEP campuses, etc.); it is NOT equivalent to missing data.

definition: Derived accountability status. 'Rated' when C_RATING is A/B/C/D/F; 'Not Rated' when C_RATING is 'Not Rated'; null when campus is not in the 2025 accountability file.

caveat: Null for 'Not Rated' campuses and for unmatched campuses.
